runs.text: Supplier Share | Strict inputs hold TAM conservative, but DDG and submarine solve different evidence problems.

text_body.plain_text: Supplier Share | Strict inputs hold TAM conservative, but DDG and submarine solve different evidence problems.

DDG APPLIED BC SUPPLIER SHARE
12.5%
MYP-corrected non-GFE BC stream

SUBMARINE APPLIED BC SUPPLIER SHARE
35.0%
Strict non-nuclear Basic Construction view

runs.text: Restored $14.58B multiyear masters; corrected outside-yards POP ~32.8%

text_body.plain_text: Restored $14.58B multiyear masters; corrected outside-yards POP ~32.8%

runs.text: Gross AP is large supplier evidence

text_body.plain_text: Gross AP is large supplier evidence

runs.text: Not additive under the current boundary

text_body.plain_text: Not additive under the current boundary

runs.text: DDG supplier-share evidence starts with a redaction correction.
The model restores $14.58B of redacted multiyear masters to correct the outside-yards POP read; the applied BC supplier share remains 12.5%.
Submarine supplier-share evidence is broad but deliberately constrained.
The 35.0% input is a strict non-nuclear, yard-excluded view; broader POP anchors near 51.8% and 48.5% stay sensitivity.
Only the applied shares feed headline TAM.
Broader POP views support the audit record, but 12.5% for DDG and 35.0% for submarine are the TAM bridge inputs.

text_body.plain_text:
DDG supplier-share evidence starts with a redaction correction.
The model restores $14.58B of redacted multiyear masters to correct the outside-yards POP read; the applied BC supplier share remains 12.5%.
Submarine supplier-share evidence is broad but deliberately constrained.
The 35.0% input is a strict non-nuclear, yard-excluded view; broader POP anchors near 51.8% and 48.5% stay sensitivity.
Only the applied shares feed headline TAM.
Broader POP views support the audit record, but 12.5% for DDG and 35.0% for submarine are the TAM bridge inputs.

runs.text: The two programs' shares are inputs to separate models;
a single blended supplier-share percentage would mislead.

text_body.plain_text: The two programs' shares are inputs to separate models; a single blended supplier-share percentage would mislead.

runs.text: Sources: (1) DDG MYP redaction correction and outside-yards place-of-performance evidence; (2) submarine coefficient and AP/LLTM boundary evidence; (3) Navy SCN and P-5c Basic Construction budget justification, FY2022–FY2027

text_body.plain_text: Sources: (1) DDG MYP redaction correction and outside-yards place-of-performance evidence; (2) submarine coefficient and AP/LLTM boundary evidence; (3) Navy SCN and P-5c Basic Construction budget justification, FY2022–FY2027
